    private edu.wpi.first.math.Matrix<edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N3,edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N1>
    updateEstimationStdDevs(org.photonvision.PhotonPoseEstimator estimator, Optional<org.photonvision.EstimatedRobotPose> estimatedPose, List<org.photonvision.targeting.PhotonTrackedTarget> targets)
    Calculates new standard deviations This algorithm is a heuristic that creates dynamic standard deviations based on number of tags, estimation strategy, and distance from the tags.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static Vision getInstance()
      Gets the singleton instance of vision.
      Returns:
      The instance of vision.

    • estimateCameraPose

      private Optional<org.photonvision.EstimatedRobotPose> estimateCameraPose(org.photonvision.PhotonCamera camera, org.photonvision.PhotonPoseEstimator estimator, edu.wpi.first.math.Matrix<edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N3,edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N1> curStdDevs, Consumer<edu.wpi.first.math.Matrix<edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N3,edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N1>> stdDevSetter)

    • frontCamGetEstimatedGlobalPose

      public Optional<org.photonvision.EstimatedRobotPose> frontCamGetEstimatedGlobalPose()
      The latest estimated robot pose on the field from vision data. This may be empty. This should only be called once per loop.
      Returns:
      An EstimatedRobotPose with an estimated pose, estimate timestamp, and targets used for estimation.

    • backCamGetEstimatedGlobalPose

      public Optional<org.photonvision.EstimatedRobotPose> backCamGetEstimatedGlobalPose()
      The latest estimated robot pose on the field from vision data. This may be empty. This should only be called once per loop.
      Returns:
      An EstimatedRobotPose with an estimated pose, estimate timestamp, and targets used for estimation.

    • updateEstimationStdDevs

      private edu.wpi.first.math.Matrix<edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N3,edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N1> updateEstimationStdDevs(org.photonvision.PhotonPoseEstimator estimator, Optional<org.photonvision.EstimatedRobotPose> estimatedPose, List<org.photonvision.targeting.PhotonTrackedTarget> targets)
      Calculates new standard deviations This algorithm is a heuristic that creates dynamic standard deviations based on number of tags, estimation strategy, and distance from the tags.
      Parameters:
      estimator - The pose estimator
      estimatedPose - The estimated pose to guess standard deviations for
      targets - All targets in this camera frame
      Returns:
      Estimated standard deviations

    • getFrontEstimationStdDevs

      public edu.wpi.first.math.Matrix<edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N3,edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N1> getFrontEstimationStdDevs()
      Returns the latest standard deviations of the estimated pose from frontCamGetEstimatedGlobalPose(). For use with SwerveDrivePoseEstimator. This should only be used when there are targets visible.

    • getBackEstimationStdDevs

      public edu.wpi.first.math.Matrix<edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N3,edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N1> getBackEstimationStdDevs()
      Returns the latest standard deviations of the estimated pose from backCamGetEstimatedGlobalPose(). For use with SwerveDrivePoseEstimator. This should only be used when there are targets visible.
